Metadata.title: GuenTours — Flights and hotels at the best price
Metadata.description: Compare and book flights and hotels across multiple providers (Travelopro, Sabre, Travelport) in a single search.

Home.heroTitleFlights: Compare and Book Flights at the Best Rates
Home.heroTitleHotels: Find the Perfect Hotel for Your Stay
Home.heroSubtitleFlights: Get direct access to thousands of destinations. Find cheap flight tickets and multi-city flights tailored to your budget.
Home.heroSubtitleHotels: Browse a wide selection of hotel rooms, residences, and vacation apartments with the best price guaranteed.
Home.feature1Body: We query transport companies and accommodation providers directly to bring you real-time updated deals.
Home.feature2Body: Confirm your travel booking with complete peace of mind through our encrypted transaction systems with no hidden fees.
Home.feature3Body: Easily update your travel options and instantly access your e-tickets and hotel confirmations from your user account.
Home.howItWorksTitle: Book Your Next Trip in 3 Easy Steps
Home.howItWorksSubtitle: Plan your entire vacation or business trip in just a few minutes.
Home.step1Body: Enter your route (round trip, multi-city flights) or your accommodation needs and filter by budget or amenities.
Home.step2Body: Select the perfect option, complete your traveler details, and process your secure payment.
Home.step3Body: Your e-tickets and hotel reservation confirmations are sent directly to your email instantly.
Home.destinationsSubtitle: Get inspired by our curated list of top travel destinations at the best market prices.

Checkout.title: Complete your booking
Checkout.priceExpired: This offer has expired or its price changed. Please search again.
Checkout.guestNotice: No account yet? We create one automatically and email you your credentials.
Checkout.paymentPlanSection: How would you like to pay?
Checkout.payNowDescription: Pay the full price now, your booking is confirmed right away.
Checkout.payLaterDescription: Pay a fixed, non-refundable reservation fee now to hold your booking; the full price is still due before the deadline (the fee is not deducted from the total).

SeatSelection.instructions: Pick {count, plural, =1 {1 available seat} other {# available seats}} on the cabin map.

Payment.balanceDeadlineNotice: Due before {deadline}, or the booking will be cancelled.
Payment.success: Payment accepted, confirming with the provider…
Payment.secureNotice: Encrypted payment, no card data is stored on our servers.

statusDescription.CONFIRMING: The provider is issuing your tickets, this takes a moment.

Footer.description: GuenTours compares Travelopro, Sabre and Travelport in real time to guarantee the best price, with secure payment and live tracking of your bookings.
Footer.madeWith: Built to travel with peace of mind.

Legal.termsIntro: These terms govern the use of the GuenTours platform to search for and book flights and hotels with our partner providers (Travelopro, Sabre, Travelport).
Legal.termsSection1Body: Each booking is subject to the pricing and availability conditions of the provider selected at search time. The displayed price is guaranteed until payment.
Legal.termsSection2Body: Payments are processed securely and encrypted. No card data is ever stored on our servers. A non-refundable deposit may be required for some installment offers.
Legal.termsSection3Body: Cancellation terms depend on the selected fare and are shown before the booking is confirmed. GuenTours cannot be held responsible for its providers' fare policies.
Legal.termsSection4Body: GuenTours acts as an intermediary between the traveler and the transport/accommodation providers, who remain solely responsible for the service provided.
Legal.privacyIntro: GuenTours takes the protection of your personal data seriously. This policy describes the information we collect and how we use it.
Legal.privacySection1Body: We collect the information needed to process bookings (identity, contact details, travelers) as well as sign-in data for your personal account.
Legal.privacySection2Body: Your data is used solely to process your bookings, inform you of their status, and improve our service. It is never sold to third parties.
Legal.privacySection3Body: The travel information required (name, dates, preferences) is shared with providers (Travelopro, Sabre, Travelport) only to fulfill your booking.
Legal.privacySection4Body: In accordance with applicable regulations, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your data by contacting us.
